name: Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort
address: Kawasan Pariwisata Lot SW1, Nusa Dua, Bali, Indonesia
description:
Khám Phá Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort - Thiên Đường Nghỉ Dưỡng Tại Bali

Nằm cách trung tâm thành phố Bali chỉ 12 km và cách sân bay quốc tế khoảng 20 phút lái xe, Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort là điểm đến lý tưởng cho du khách muốn tận hưởng vẻ đẹp tự nhiên và dịch vụ đẳng cấp. Khách sạn được xây dựng từ năm 2011, mang phong cách hiện đại pha lẫn nét truyền thống đặc trưng của Bali, mang đến không gian nghỉ dưỡng sang trọng và thoải mái.

Với quy định nhận phòng từ 15:00 và trả phòng đến 12:00 trưa hôm sau, khách lưu trú có thể dễ dàng sắp xếp lịch trình của mình để khám phá đảo ngọc này. Đặc biệt, khách sạn thân thiện với gia đình, cho phép trẻ em từ 1 đến 11 tuổi ở miễn phí, giúp các gia đình có thể tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ trọn vẹn mà không lo về chi phí thêm cho trẻ nhỏ. Đây chính là nơi lý tưởng để bạn và gia đình tạo nên những kỷ niệm đáng nhớ tại Bali.

Tiện Nghi Giải Trí Đẳng Cấp tại Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort

Tại Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort, du khách có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng không khí sôi động tại quầy bar sang trọng của khách sạn. Nơi đây không chỉ là điểm lý tưởng để thưởng thức những loại đồ uống tinh tế và sáng tạo, mà còn là nơi lý tưởng để gặp gỡ bạn bè hoặc thư giãn sau một ngày dài khám phá Bali. Không khí ấm cúng, dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp cùng với các loại cocktail độc đáo sẽ làm hài lòng cả những khách hàng khó tính nhất.

Quầy bar của khách sạn mang đến trải nghiệm giải trí tuyệt vời trong không gian thiết kế tinh tế, phù hợp cho các buổi tụ họp thân mật hoặc các dịp đặc biệt. Hãy thưởng thức những ly cocktail đặc sắc khi ngắm nhìn cảnh biển tuyệt đẹp hoặc thư giãn trong không gian âm nhạc nhẹ nhàng, mang đến cảm giác thư thái và sảng khoái. Đây chính là điểm đến lý tưởng để kết thúc một ngày tuyệt vời tại Bali trong không khí vui vẻ, thoải mái.

Tiện Nghi Phục Vụ 24/7 và Dọn Phòng Hàng Ngày tại Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort

Tại Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort, khách hàng sẽ được trải nghiệm dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, mang đến sự tiện lợi và linh hoạt trong việc đặt món ăn hoặc yêu cầu dịch vụ bất cứ lúc nào trong ngày đêm. Đội ngũ nhân viên tận tâm luôn sẵn sàng phục vụ, giúp quý khách cảm thấy thoải mái và yên tâm trong suốt kỳ nghỉ của mình. Bên cạnh đó, dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày đảm bảo không gian nghỉ dưỡng luôn sạch sẽ, gọn gàng và thoáng đãng, mang lại cảm giác mới mẻ mỗi ngày cho khách lưu trú. Sự kết hợp hoàn hảo giữa tiện nghi hiện đại và dịch vụ chăm sóc tận tâm chính là điểm nhấn giúp khách hàng có trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời tại resort.

Tiện Nghi Gửi Xe An Toàn Tại Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort

Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort tự hào mang đến dịch vụ gửi xe thuận tiện ngay trong khuôn viên khách sạn, giúp quý khách yên tâm về phương tiện của mình trong suốt kỳ nghỉ. Khu vực đỗ xe rộng rãi, an toàn và dễ dàng tiếp cận, phù hợp cho cả khách đi xe riêng lẫn xe thuê. Đội ngũ nhân viên thân thiện luôn sẵn sàng hỗ trợ để đảm bảo quá trình đỗ xe diễn ra nhanh chóng và thuận tiện nhất.

Tiện Nghi Phòng Sang Trọng tại Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort

Tại Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort, mỗi phòng được trang bị đầy đủ các tiện nghi cao cấp nhằm mang đến sự thoải mái tối đa cho khách lưu trú. Quý khách sẽ tận hưởng không khí mát lạnh từ hệ thống điều hòa, cùng với các đồ dùng cao cấp như áo choàng tắm mềm mại, khăn tắm sạch sẽ và các sản phẩm toiletries chất lượng. Phòng còn có TV vệ tinh/cáp, trình chiếu phim trong nhà, và các tiện ích giải trí đa dạng để khách có thể thư giãn sau một ngày khám phá Bali.

Không gian phòng còn được trang bị các tiện nghi hiện đại như máy pha cà phê/trà, minibar miễn phí, tủ lạnh, cùng với nước đóng chai miễn phí để khách luôn cảm thấy dễ chịu. Các phòng còn có ban công hoặc sân thượng view đẹp, rèm chắn sáng, cùng khu vực phòng khách riêng biệt giúp tạo cảm giác riêng tư và thoải mái. Ngoài ra, khách còn được cung cấp báo hàng ngày, máy sấy tóc, đồ dùng vệ sinh cá nhân, và các loại khăn, ga trải giường cao cấp, tất cả đều hướng tới mang lại trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng hoàn hảo.

Tiện Nghi Ẩm Thực Đẳng Cấp Tại Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort

Tại Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort, du khách sẽ được trải nghiệm dịch vụ ẩm thực đa dạng và tiện lợi ngay trong khuôn viên khách sạn. Dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ giúp bạn thưởng thức các món ăn yêu thích bất cứ lúc nào trong ngày, mang đến sự thoải mái và tiện nghi tối đa. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn cung cấp buffet sáng phong phú mỗi sáng, để bắt đầu ngày mới tràn đầy năng lượng với các món ăn địa phương và quốc tế hấp dẫn.

Không chỉ vậy, dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày đảm bảo không gian nghỉ dưỡng của bạn luôn sạch sẽ, gọn gàng, tạo cảm giác thoải mái như ở nhà. Với các tiện nghi ẩm thực đẳng cấp này, Courtyard Bali Nusa Dua mang đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng hoàn hảo, giúp bạn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tại Bali một cách trọn vẹn và dễ chịu.

Các loại phòng đa dạng tại Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort

Tại Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort, du khách có nhiều lựa chọn phòng phù hợp với nhu cầu và sở thích của mình. Các phòng Deluxe Garden View và Deluxe Pool View đều rộng 35 mét vuông, mang đến không gian thoải mái với ban công nhìn ra vườn hoặc hồ bơi, trang bị giường King hoặc Double phù hợp cho cặp đôi hoặc gia đình nhỏ. Ngoài ra, Premium Deluxe với diện tích lớn hơn 41 mét vuông cung cấp không gian rộng rãi hơn để tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ của bạn. Đối với nhóm đông hoặc gia đình, phòng Deluxe Pool Terrace và Deluxe Garden View với hai giường Double hoặc giường King, cùng ban công hoặc sân thượng bên hồ bơi, mang lại trải nghiệm thư giãn và riêng tư tuyệt vời. Đặc biệt, One Bedroom Suite rộng 73 mét vuông cung cấp không gian sống sang trọng, phù hợp cho những du khách muốn tận hưởng sự tiện nghi cao cấp trong kỳ nghỉ của mình.

Khám Phá Vẻ Đẹp Tuyệt Vời của Nusa Dua, Bali

Nusa Dua nổi bật như một viên ngọc quý của Bali, nổi bật với bãi biển trắng mịn và làn nước trong xanh tuyệt đẹp, lý tưởng để thư giãn và tận hưởng những ngày nắng ấm. Khu vực này còn nổi tiếng với các resort sang trọng, sân golf đẳng cấp và các trung tâm mua sắm cao cấp, mang đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng đẳng cấp quốc tế cho du khách. Ngoài ra, Nusa Dua còn có nhiều điểm tham quan văn hóa và nghệ thuật, như các lễ hội truyền thống và các buổi biểu diễn đặc sắc, giúp du khách hiểu rõ hơn về nét đẹp văn hóa đặc trưng của Bali.

Với vị trí thuận tiện gần các điểm du lịch nổi bật như Bảo tàng Pasifika và khu vực mua sắm Bali Collection, Nusa Dua là điểm đến lý tưởng để khám phá vẻ đẹp tự nhiên cũng như văn hóa phong phú của Bali. Khu vực này còn dễ dàng kết nối với các điểm đến khác của đảo, mang lại sự linh hoạt và tiện lợi cho hành trình của bạn. Dù là để thư giãn trên bãi biển hay khám phá các hoạt động thể thao dưới nước, Nusa Dua luôn mang đến trải nghiệm khó quên cho mọi du khách.

Hướng Dẫn Di Chuyển Từ Sân Bay Đến Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort

Từ sân bay quốc tế Ngurah Rai, du khách có thể dễ dàng di chuyển đến Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort bằng nhiều phương tiện khác nhau. Khoảng cách từ sân bay đến khu nghỉ dưỡng chỉ khoảng 15 km, mất khoảng 20-30 phút lái xe tùy vào tình hình giao thông. Bạn có thể lựa chọn dịch vụ đưa đón riêng do khách sạn cung cấp để đảm bảo sự tiện lợi và thoải mái, hoặc thuê xe taxi chính thống tại quầy dịch vụ của sân bay. Ngoài ra, các dịch vụ xe đưa đón chung cũng có thể phù hợp cho những ai muốn tiết kiệm chi phí hơn, nhưng cần đặt trước để đảm bảo có chỗ và đúng giờ.

Nếu bạn muốn trải nghiệm cảm giác tự do và linh hoạt hơn trong hành trình của mình, các dịch vụ xe thuê tự lái hoặc xe chia sẻ như Grab cũng là lựa chọn phổ biến tại Bali. Với đội ngũ tài xế chuyên nghiệp và dịch vụ tiện lợi, bạn sẽ dễ dàng ngắm nhìn cảnh quan xung quanh và bắt đầu kỳ nghỉ của mình một cách thoải mái nhất. Dù chọn phương tiện nào, hành trình từ sân bay đến resort sẽ mở ra cho bạn những trải nghiệm đầu tiên tuyệt vời của Bali - nơi thiên nhiên tươi đẹp và văn hóa đặc sắc chờ đón bạn khám phá.

Khám Phá Những Điểm Đến Nổi Bật Xung Quanh Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort

Tọa lạc tại trung tâm của khu nghỉ dưỡng Nusa Dua, khách lưu trú tại Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua có cơ hội dễ dàng khám phá những điểm đến hấp dẫn gần đó. Bãi biển Nusa Dua nổi bật với bãi cát trắng mịn và làn nước trong xanh, lý tưởng để thư giãn hoặc tham gia các hoạt động thể thao dưới nước tại Tanjung Benoa. Ngoài ra, du khách còn có thể khám phá Turtle Island, một địa điểm nổi tiếng với các rạn san hô đa dạng và các loài rùa biển quý hiếm, mang lại trải nghiệm tuyệt vời về thiên nhiên hoang dã của Bali.

Không chỉ dừng lại ở đó, khu vực còn sở hữu nhiều điểm tham quan văn hóa và thể thao như Bảo tàng Pasifika, nơi lưu giữ các tác phẩm nghệ thuật đặc sắc của châu Á và Thái Bình Dương, hay Bali National Golf Club và Sân gôn Nusa Dua dành cho những ai yêu thích môn thể thao này. Trung tâm hội nghị Bali và Phức hợp nơi thờ cúng Puja Mandala cũng góp phần làm phong phú thêm trải nghiệm của du khách khi khám phá vùng đất này, mang đến sự kết hợp hoàn hảo giữa thiên nhiên, văn hóa và giải trí.

Các nhà hàng xung quanh Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort

Khu vực xung quanh khách sạn là thiên đường ẩm thực đa dạng, phù hợp với mọi khẩu vị. Du khách có thể thưởng thức món Babi Guling đặc trưng tại Warung Babi Guling Sari Dewi Bp. Dobil hoặc khám phá ẩm thực Trung Hoa tại Warung Laota. Đối với những ai yêu thích ẩm thực Nhật Bản, Sama Sama Yakiniku Japanese Restaurant Nusa Dua mang đến trải nghiệm thịt nướng đậm đà. Thêm vào đó, Queens of India mang đến những món ăn Ấn Độ truyền thống đậm đà hương vị, trong khi Kampung Bule giới thiệu các món ăn đặc trưng của Indonesia. Đối với những buổi tối thư giãn, khách có thể ghé qua Sama-Sama E Style Café & Bar hoặc Breezes Tapas Lounge để thưởng thức đồ uống và món ăn nhẹ. Các nhà hàng như The Tao Bali, Chopstick Restaurant và Indian Dhaba cũng là những điểm đến lý tưởng để khám phá ẩm thực đa dạng của Bali.

Các điểm mua sắm nổi bật gần Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort

Khách lưu trú tại Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua có cơ hội khám phá nhiều điểm mua sắm hấp dẫn trong khu vực. Bạn có thể ghé thăm Bali Collection, trung tâm mua sắm lớn với đa dạng các thương hiệu quốc tế và địa phương, mang đến trải nghiệm mua sắm phong phú và thú vị. Ngoài ra, các cửa hàng như Lacoste nổi bật với những sản phẩm thời trang cao cấp, trong khi Eling và Balisurf mang đến các mặt hàng thủ công mỹ nghệ độc đáo và đồ lưu niệm đặc trưng của Bali. Các điểm mua sắm này không chỉ giúp bạn dễ dàng mua sắm quà lưu niệm mà còn mang lại cảm giác thưởng thức văn hóa địa phương ngay trong lòng Bali.

Giá Phòng Trung Bình tại Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort so với Giá Trung Bình tại Bali

Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort nổi bật với mức giá phòng trung bình từ 151 đến 200 USD, mang đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng cao cấp và đẳng cấp cho khách hàng. Đây là mức giá cao hơn nhiều so với mức trung bình của các khách sạn khác tại Bali, vốn chỉ dao động từ 76 đến 100 USD mỗi đêm. Điều này phản ánh chất lượng dịch vụ và tiện nghi vượt trội mà resort mang lại, phù hợp cho những du khách tìm kiếm sự sang trọng và tiện nghi tối đa trong kỳ nghỉ của mình.

Với mức giá cao hơn so với trung bình của thành phố, Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort thực sự là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn tận hưởng trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng đẳng cấp trong không gian sang trọng, dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp và các tiện ích cao cấp. Dù giá có phần cao hơn, nhưng khách hàng sẽ được hưởng thụ những dịch vụ tốt nhất, xứng đáng với số tiền bỏ ra để có một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ tại Bali.

Đánh giá tích cực về khách sạn Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort

Khách hàng đều hài lòng với chất lượng dịch vụ tại Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort, đặc biệt khen ngợi sự thân thiện và nhiệt tình của đội ngũ nhân viên. Từ phòng ở đẹp, sạch sẽ đến các tiện ích như hồ bơi tuyệt vời, mọi thứ đều được đánh giá cao. Thực đơn sáng đa dạng, thức ăn ngon và phong cách phục vụ chuyên nghiệp đã làm hài lòng khách lưu trú. Vị trí của khách sạn cũng rất thuận tiện, phù hợp cho những ai muốn khám phá Bali. Tất cả những yếu tố này đã tạo nên một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng đáng nhớ, khiến khách hàng luôn muốn quay trở lại.

Đánh Giá Tích Cực về Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort

Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort nổi bật với điểm số tổng thể ấn tượng 8.7, phản ánh sự hài lòng cao của khách hàng về trải nghiệm tại đây. Khách lưu trú đặc biệt đánh giá cao chất lượng dịch vụ và sự thân thiện của đội ngũ nhân viên, góp phần tạo nên môi trường nghỉ dưỡng thoải mái và chuyên nghiệp. Các tiện nghi của resort đạt điểm số cao 8.8, mang lại sự tiện nghi tối đa cho khách, từ các khu vực giải trí đến các tiện ích hiện đại, đảm bảo mọi nhu cầu đều được đáp ứng đầy đủ.

Ngoài ra, sự sạch sẽ và vệ sinh tại resort nhận được điểm số tuyệt vời 9.0, giúp khách cảm thấy yên tâm và hài lòng trong suốt kỳ nghỉ. Vị trí của khách sạn cũng khá thuận tiện, với điểm số 8.4, dễ dàng tiếp cận các điểm tham quan nổi bật của Bali. Tất cả những yếu tố này kết hợp lại tạo nên một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng đẳng cấp, khiến khách hàng luôn hài lòng và mong muốn quay trở lại lần nữa.

demographics.name: Gia đình có thanh thiếu niên

sample_comments.text:
・Nhân viên rất thân thiện và phục vụ nhanh chóng.
・Bữa sáng có nhiều loại phong phú và phù hợp với khẩu vị của người Nhật.
・Squirrel ở khu vực ăn sáng và bên hồ bơi rất dễ thương, khiến tôi cảm thấy được an ủi rất nhiều.
・Đi bộ đến bãi biển rất gần và có xe buýt đưa đón, vì vậy dù không nằm bên bãi biển nhưng không phải lo lắng.
・Được nâng cấp từ phòng có tầm nhìn ra vườn sang phòng có tầm nhìn ra hồ bơi.
・Phòng sạch sẽ, khu vực nước không có vấn đề gì.

・Phòng hơi chật. Có vẻ sẽ hơi khó khăn cho 2 người nếu ở nhiều đêm.

sample_comments.title: Rất tốt
sample_comments.positives: The beach was pleasant and peaceful, offering a relaxing atmosphere. A convenient shuttle service operates hourly to and from the beach. The breakfast was of good quality, with a wide variety of options available. Overall, it is a good destination, whether traveling alone or with family.
sample_comments.negatives: I was shocked to find that I was put in a connecting room despite that I was traveling alone, as this does not align with the standards I expect from a five-star hotel. Although the room was changed the following day after I raised a complain this remains a significant concern. I strongly request the hotel to review its room allocation procedures to ensure that similar situation does not happen to future guests.

sample_comments.text: This guest did not leave comments about this hotel.
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời

sample_comments.text: Nusa Dua có thể tận hưởng mọi thứ, bên trong khu nghỉ dưỡng có hồ bơi và nhiều chương trình miễn phí (yoga, làm vòng tay từ vỏ sò, làm fanjo và nghe kể chuyện lịch sử, v.v.). Chúng tôi đã ở đây 2 đêm, bãi biển chỉ cách 10 phút đi bộ, nhưng nếu đi shuttle thì sẽ được đưa đến nơi có ghế tắm biển của khu nghỉ dưỡng để tận hưởng. Vào buổi sáng nước đầy, buổi chiều có thể thấy bãi bùn. Họ cũng cho thuê xe đạp, chúng tôi đã đạp quanh vùng trong 4 tiếng rất vui vẻ. Bữa sáng kết hợp bữa trưa, bữa tối chúng tôi thưởng thức tại các nhà hàng ngon gần đây trong không khí thú vị. Mọi thứ đều rất hài lòng. Cảm ơn!
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Garden View, Guest room, 1 King, Garden view, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Beautiful hotel, would definitely stay again!
sample_comments.positives: The property was beautiful, pools were simply amazing and the breakfast buffet was one of the best we have had, not just in Bali! Outstanding in every way! Special mention to Budhi the chef who came and spoke to our girls may times, lovely man!
sample_comments.negatives:
My only gripe was the living conditions of the 3 beautiful bunnies near the children's area. They spent a lot of time inside with minimum outside time- I spoke to staff to encourage letting them
Out to play which they said they did (we were there 7 days and they really didn't come out very much at all). It was upsetting for us as animal lovers seeing them so restricted and for a few other families I spoke to. I did go to the pet store and buy them a few toys for stimulation and some food. Please make their little area happier or don't keep them :)

sample_comments.text: Từ sảnh đến phòng đều có mùi thơm, điều này khiến người ta cảm thấy rất thoải mái. Nhân viên đều rất thân thiện và lịch sự, bữa sáng cũng rất phong phú, còn có cháo trắng và bún, thật hiếm có. Chỉ có điều bãi biển khá xa, mặc dù khách sạn có xe nhưng thời gian cố định, nhất định phải đợi xe trước, nếu không bỏ lỡ phải đợi thêm một giờ nữa. Ngoài khách sạn có nhiều nhà hàng, còn có siêu thị, ăn uống rất tiện lợi. Đây là một nơi lý tưởng cho kỳ nghỉ, tôi và gia đình đã có một kỳ nghỉ vui vẻ ở đây.
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.response:
Dear Yuanyuan,

Thank you very much for sharing your wonderful review of your stay with us. We're delighted to hear that you and your family had a pleasant holiday and enjoyed our welcoming atmosphere, fragrant surroundings, and the variety of breakfast options. It's also lovely to know that our friendly and polite staff helped make your stay more comfortable.

We truly appreciate your feedback regarding the beach shuttle service, and we'll certainly keep it in mind as we continue improving our guest experience.

We're grateful for your kind words and hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you and your family back to Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort for another relaxing getaway.

Warm regards,
Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort

sample_comments.title: Tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: The location was perfect. Facilities of hotel are so nice. The pool, lazy river were awesome. Food was delicious and the staff were very kind and supportive all the time during our 2 nights stay.
sample_comments.negatives: None

sample_comments.text: Tôi đã ở lại với vợ cho kỷ niệm 10 năm ngày cưới. Khách sạn đã chuẩn bị dịch vụ chào đón trong phòng. Tất cả nhân viên đều thân thiện và các bể bơi rất tuyệt. Bãi biển cũng rất gần. Giá cả rất hợp lý. Rất đáng để giới thiệu cho mọi loại người.

sample_comments.positives: Again, I chose this hotel because the staff and location were brilliant and I will be going back in August with my sister and niece, the shuttle bus from hotel to beach and back is a brilliant idea.
sample_comments.negatives:
Another reason why I chose this hotel was the outside whirlpool / jacuzzi, upon arrival on the 5th may I found the jacuzzi to be out of order, it took maintenance 7 days to fix it, I actually managed to squeeze one in before my checkout at 1pm.
The Towels in my room are starting to look worn and used and could do with an overhaul of new sets of towels.

sample_comments.text:
Dịch vụ, sự phản hồi, cơ sở vật chất, vệ sinh, vị trí
Mọi thứ đều hài lòng. Nếu có dịp đến Bali lần nữa,
chắc chắn tôi sẽ ghé thăm Nusa Dua. Tầm nhìn hồ bơi ở đây đẹp hơn bất cứ nơi nào. Bãi biển riêng cũng rất tuyệt.

sample_comments.title: We were very disappointed with the Marriott in Nusa Dua.
sample_comments.positives: Sadly, the hotel was a disappointment. The only good thing is that they have a doctor on site in case someone gets sick.
sample_comments.negatives:
The rooms have no soundproofing, even with a closed door you can hear everything from the hallway, the staff sweeping the floor, pushing trolleys, delivering room service, opening and closing of doors, the guests walking, kids running etc. Everything comes through and it is impossible to rest. Also, the rooms are non smoking but the guests can smoke on the balconies. Because of the poor insulation even if the balcony door is closed, if someone smokes on the balcony next to yours the smoke gets into the room and you are exposed to second hand smoking. 
The beach at the beach club is very dirty, the sand and the water as well. You have to go in really deep into the sea in order to not to be surrounded by trash, mainly plastic. When I asked the staff about this, they told me something about tides and lots of rain lately, however, the beach at all the other five star hotels was clean. Even the public beach across the road was much cleaner than the beach at the Marriott.
The hotel also lacks authenticity and the Balinese vibe. It is just a giant resort with no soul.
The floors in the rooms is covered with cheap vinyl, making them feel like more like hospital rooms.

sample_comments.title: Pleasant Stay & Nice Resort
sample_comments.text: Very nice hotel and good ambiance. You can feel the welcome start from the hotel lobby until you reach your room. Nice pool and it also very near to the beach as the resort provide shuttle to the private beach.

sample_comments.text: Very big hotel so not so friendly for family's, very expensive for everything same price as Aus for meals/beerS

sample_comments.title: shocing hotel
sample_comments.text: goodness where do i start from, this is amrriot we talking yet a 2 star hotel will out perform this horrible hotel, first the room we were given the tiolet was not flushing, the phone in the room was not working, so we asked nicley to be fixed and left the hotel we came back 12 midnighit nothing was touched in the room so after a major fuss they changed our room , the other room was even worst, the room was humid and stunk of humidity the sheets were almost wet and the had a bad odour, breakfast very avarge for a 5 star hotel, i will not recommend my enemy to go there this is a cone and this hotel should be named horror hotel, anpother thing the security in the place the make you feel like you done something we all like security but they can be friendly in the mean time. shocking shockking shocking.

sample_comments.title: Terrible
sample_comments.negatives:
Poor management. 
I have received several threats call to my room and informed the management. Also, there were kids keep ringing the bill of my room. 
I informed the management to check the CCTV to find out who did it. But without a response. 

The hotel entrance always smells like cooking. 
The rooms smell like chlorine.

sample_comments.title: The room was not clean, had mosquito.
sample_comments.text:
Disappointed. 
The toilet bowl was not clean, the room had mosquitoes, and the next day, no clean towel. Yet no manager are apologize about this.
sample_comments.positives: The bed is queen size, twin.

sample_comments.title: Not the marriott standard
sample_comments.text:
The Marriott standard was missing. We had to wait 30 minutes in the line for check-in. Even after that we got only one room while the other interconnected room was not ready yet. Even when we got the other room, the bathroom was not equipped with the towels, toiletries etc. Had to remind them 3 times!!! MoMo cafe is the only restaurant in the hotel, and the menu is not great either. The lady who took our order didn't know the difference between 8 inch and 8 cms pizza!!!!!
A lot needs to be done to improve the service quality!
sample_comments.positives: The breakfast spread is good, its a walking distance from the beach and its close to Bali Collection which has dining options

sample_comments.title: hotel not worth for the money
sample_comments.text:
First time entering the hotel, the public area really makes good impression. However, after i was shown to the room, i would expect someyhing more than that. The air conditioner was horrible. The air seemed not to spread around the room evenly.

The service was okay. It took some time for housekeeping to clean up the room though.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful Hotel with Unfortunate Location
sample_comments.text: The security of the hotel was a bit too much, after parking car guests have to make a big round walk to the lobby even after the car is being searched and the person is not carrying anything. The hotel has double entrance gates makes you feel 'so secure'. The beach is far from the hotel. Valet parking is lousy. During my 4-day stay there not a single time when I needed the car the valet man was there so I had to collect the keys from the lobby and walked down myself to get the car, so what's the point of having valet service??
sample_comments.positives: The pool is nice and clean

sample_comments.title: nice hotel
sample_comments.text: The location of the hotel is not perfect and there is only shuttle to the beach. So, the transport is not easy... The hotel itself is nice, new and clean. We are quite disappointed that we can not get a later check-out even though we are Marriott gold members.

sample_comments.title: Disappointed
sample_comments.text:
I was hoping to have a grand time with my family. Since this is the first time i took my son to Bali, and i also brought my parents. On the very first day, just after breakfast i took my son to wet his feet for a minute in the pool, but as soon as we got in the pool, some rude staff approached us and said that the pool was closed for 2 hours, cause they're having some photoshoot. Whatever the purpose of the shoot, i think its stupid to forbid guest to use the facility of the hotel, specially when its located in nusa dua. Not much to do around there, so pool access is pretty crucial at times. I was really disappointed cause the staff was practically kicking me and my 3 year old son out of the pool in the manner that is far from acceptable
for me. I definitely wont be going back there. For anyone considering to stay at this hotel, specially if youre a family traveler, think again. This hotel care about income more than guest satisfaction.

Reserved room by Agoda but Hotel staff did not accept my Agoda Hotel confirmation letter which show B/F included in chinese. They further told me I do not entitle to have B/F even I give them another Hotel confirmation letter which is in English.
Totally disappointed !!! 
Hope Agoda can look into this case because they also ruin your brand name !

sample_comments.title: Don't go by Marriott name
sample_comments.text: I am afraid the room condition and service quality will degrade the Marriott name - Broken toilet door hook, mosquitos in room, improper room cleaning. Lost half day and money due to incorrect information and cab booking by the front desk.

sample_comments.title: toilet
sample_comments.text: The shower area is horrible. We had to place bath towels on the floor to stop the water flowing into the room.

sample_comments.text:
Pool was too dark at night and my children were afraid to swim there - even at 8pm. Door of bath room did not/could not lock. No hose for washing anus after dirty business. Internet in the room was intermittent. Bus service to the beach should start earlier and end later.
Friendly staff. Good service. Rooms were clean. Staff were eager to please and they upgraded all rooms. But the king size bed is not big.
sample_comments.positives: Morning breakfast by the pool, cleanness, huge pool

sample_comments.title: Service & Cleanliness Not Good
sample_comments.text: Courtyard management must pay more attention to the cleanliness of guest rooms & employee services to guests, where they only pay attention to the external appearance of their guests. I was very offended by the service they provided to my family. The items I left at the front desk were just left there like trash. Meanwhile, other guests' belongings are not treated like that. I was warned from the start that my child has allergies, so the room & everything in it must be clean. The reality is not like that. There were even some ants under the pillow & table. Even their housekeeping left used tissue on the headboard of the bed. I really regret choosing Courtyard.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Laura,

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We understand how frustrating it was, and we apologize for the unsatisfactory experience you had at our resort. 

We are addressing the issues with our housekeeping team to ensure such oversights don't happen again. Your concerns about the treatment of your belongings are taken seriously, and corrective measures will be implemented. We value your input and hope to have the opportunity to make amends on a future visit.

Thank you for bringing this to our attention. We would appreciate another time to welcoming you back here for a better stay experience.

Warm regards,
Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Garden View, Guest room, 1 King, Garden view, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Poor customer service and value
sample_comments.text: We stayed at the Courtyard on our last night in Bali to be close to the airport and early morning flight home. First impressions are good, spacious modern and fantastic large pool area. The problem began in the evening we were shocked to hear such loud singing almost as if it was in our actual room. Turns out even though hotel half empty we were given a connecting room with a young man travelling with friends and out for a good time. The connecting door does nothing to stop the noise from the room next door, laughing, singing, talking non-stop, doorbells are extra loud here as well. Woken all night, hotel changed us rooms after midnight when he still wouldn't stop. A bad end to a lovely relaxing Bali holiday, would recommend Alya in Ubud very peaceful and Montogo in Seminyak as well, certainly no flimsy connecting doors. The only people should be put in such rooms are families and friends travelling together otherwise you really have no privacy, peace or quiet...

sample_comments.negatives: Breakfast was like a zoo. Too many people and not enough tables every morning. There's not atmosphere in the evenings, no music at the bar area. Pool bar closed at seven. Like a dead hotel to be honest. Seven of us went to dinner at the restaurant, which only had four other tables occupied. We waited an hour to get our order! Didn't go back obviously as there are many options outside the hotel.

sample_comments.title: unhappy person on holiday
sample_comments.text: room I paid for with Agoda was not made available to me, was offered free drink returned ( I can buy my own ). in adequate drinks facilities in the room coffe and tea. later moved to another room ( the one I should have had previously ), breakfast was not good egbs poached eggs like rubber and I was one of the first persons at the table that morning. To have my room cleaned I had to wate over 5 hours and finally when using the gym for training I was informed by the attendant I should mind how I use the weights due to a child being in the room not being attended by it's mother. I then advised the attendant that I have been using the gym for the past 39 years and have never been requested to look after a child "NOT ACCEPTABLE "

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.negatives: Checkin took forever. After waiting for three hours we were given non-functional rooms. AC was not working, it wasn't clean.

sample_comments.title: quite dissappointed
sample_comments.text:
i checked in with my colleagues. all room with double bed not available, they upgrade one level to twin bed. it's ok. but said one still not available, have to wait.
i wait in my colleague's room, until 1 hour still no update from them. dissappointed. The room key also error, need to walk a big turn again to the receptionist.

No hair dryer, for me it's ok. but for ladies guest, will be issue.
sample_comments.positives: clean, large and not so expensive

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: The swimming pool, the ambience near the momo cafe was good. Room was spacious
sample_comments.negatives:
We were travelling with a 2.5 yr old, that too for the first time for my son. First, we booked the room from Oct 29 and reached late on Oct 30, therefore missing a whole day. I informed the hotel 2-3 days back that this was a mistake. They still charged us a FULL DAY EXTRA STAY AS THEY SAID IT WAS DUE TO THE FACT THAT WE RESERVED THROUGH BOOKING.COM . We were also immediately given the room in the ground floor (lobby level) with the worst view. When questioned, the woman was adamant that nothing is available and only when I said that this is the least they can do, I was given a room on 2nd floor. The woman was laughing while speaking a different language with her supervisor. 
Same thing happened for dinner charges. Each dinner was charged by cash while we tried to reason that we will pay while checking out. The staff insisted that we did not make any deposit while the receptionist never once mentioned that we needed to separately make a deposit. Shelling out that much amount of IDR was an unnecessary trouble.
The saddest part is every part of our trip, people were kind and nice to us to as we were travelling with a kid, yet a hotel like this was not! Strange!
Otherwise the stay was fine. Frankly, I will not recommend courtyard, there are much better hotels near the nusa dua and other beaches. Other hotels such as Grand Hyatt, Melia is far better in location and facilities.

sample_comments.title: Disappointing
sample_comments.text: Disappointing! got 1 unprofessional driver, rooms were not clean, no bath-up on my room as well!
sample_comments.positives: Nice lobby, great kids club, comfortable environment

sample_comments.title: Dissapointing
sample_comments.negatives:
Room was very noisy and couldn't sleep as we were in an adjoining room with very loud neighbours. The cost of good and beverages was expensive compared to the quality .
Lack of poolside seating as many guests reserved spots and they were. Allowed to stay unoccupied. The beach was too far to walk which was not clear on the website. Overall not a good experience

sample_comments.title: Great swimming pool and hospitality
sample_comments.text:
Really loved to stay at Courtyard Nusa Dua. Great swimming pool for relaxing and enjoying Bali vibes. Eventough going to their private beach took some distance, but they provided free shuttle hourly from Hotel to their private beach. 
Local restaurants and souvenir shops were within walking distance from Hotel.
Really kind and friendly staff, all showed great hospitality. Special thanks to Yoga from housekeeping who gave us exceptional service beyond our expectations, his attetion to small details really pleased us.
Thank you Courtyard Nusa Dua for making our holiday very memorable.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Pool View, Guest Room, 2 Double, Pool View, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Deceitful staff
sample_comments.text: I booked one night here and prepaid the room. Unfortunately, I brought the wrong credit card with me. I presented all documents showing I'm the same person including the credit card e-statement. Staff said that they need to charge my card again and would just reverse the charge on Monday as banks were closed. It has been almost a week now and no one from the hotel has contacted me to confirm the reversal. My stay would have been great except for this deceitful practice.

sample_comments.title: Too much waiting
sample_comments.text: We had to wait almost one hour for check in, after we get to our nice room, we still have to wait another 1/2 hours to have our towel, napkin and others .

sample_comments.title: I won't stay here again
sample_comments.text: Very noisy even in the midnight . I can't sleep well .

sample_comments.title: Weekend hotel trip from Jakarta
sample_comments.text:
1- Room not cleaned on one day til 5pm+.
2- Hotel not beachfront, rely upon shuttle bus to take you to small Marriot beach area some 8 mins drive away or 2km walk.
3- Narrow pool but long type running between hotel room wings. One side dark- one side sunny.
4- Insufficient sun beds in pool area, if you don't grab one by 6am then forget...
5- Breakfast good but hectic - better at 10am.
6- Bar in pool closed at 8pm.
7- Really poor gym.
sample_comments.positives: Got room free upgrade but garden view to motorbike parking, breakfast,

sample_comments.title: Just an ordinary western hotel thrown in Bali...
sample_comments.text:
Great pool and thats about it.... needs more local culture.

The room service menu sucks, why not reflect the culture of the destination more... only 7 Indonesian dishes on the whole menu ( incl kids, desserts etc.. ).

Its just another western hotel chucked in Bali.... you can have the same thing in Australia or USA. :)

sample_comments.title: Dissapointing hotel, we never stay here again
sample_comments.text: We feel dissapointed with this hotel. Our son fell down several times because of the slippery floor while it was raining. The hotel looks very old eventhough it was only built on 2011 and it seems that this hotel is not maintained well. We can see many leakage on the ceiling. The room was small and the furniture looks so old. The wall was so thin that we can hear our neighbour conversation or the kids running around above our room. The towel are so old that its colour is grey. They only give free 2 hour time for our kids to play in the kids club otherwise there is an extra charge for that.

sample_comments.title: Average
sample_comments.text:
I found the hotel very average first because of its location. Nusa Dua is a proper tourist ghetto which gives the wrong outlook of Bali. 
The hotel itself was okay, but it lacks authenticity. It looks westernised to a large scale! Moreover the corridors never ends and the conditions of common areas are not good (holes in the ceiling, water dropping from ceiling and walls etc.) Also there is no direct access to the beach and you get to take a free shuttle from the hotel. The beach is nice but there are rubbish everywhere.

sample_comments.title: All show and no go

sample_comments.title: Hopeless would be a complement
sample_comments.text:
New Years celebrations ruined by one of the worse Marriot establishments I have ever come across. Let me preface my review by saying that the property is well maintained and looks good. That about as far as the compliments go Im afraid. I will list all issues by the hotels offerings:

1) Marriott Beach facilities - Rating (Abysmal)
Justification : I spent close to 45 minutes waiting on a Mojito (if the drinks were being flown in from Jakarta, I can understand but this was truly an extraordinary wait time for a basic cocktail mix). It doesn't end there I'm afraid, we did make a return run to the beach some days later to find that there were no beach towels available. We did not take the hotel shuttle back and opted to hop a taxi to a restaurant nearby (wet trunks and all) to the point I had to borrow linen from the restaurant just to dry up. Is this not a basic facilities failure? 
2) Dapur Santai Pool Bar and Grill - Rating (Fair)
Justification : Again with the record breaking wait time for a Tequila Sunrise (clocked at 30 minutes) to which I got fed up of waiting, I called the waitress and she conveniently told me the order was not locked in. Only after a public outburst which is not something common to me whilst on break, did fear set in and service levels started improving. 
3) Momo Express - Rating (Excellent)
Justification : Astuti from Momo Express.She is a seasoned hand and was most helpful on the rainy nights when we stopped for drinks. 
4) Momo Restaurant - Rating (Fair)
Justification : There are at least two instances I can recall where we made orders for coffee at breakfast that didn't arrive . There are no proper guidelines or boards on where exactly to wait to be seated, we commandeered a table on the first day as no one had informed us of the process, there was plenty of wait staff around but none seemed to be attentive. I would be waving my hands around at times and no action was taken.
5) The Actual Residences - Rating (Fair)

sample_comments.title: Contemporary hotel but no beach front

If you like urban international contemporary style business hotels, then you will enjoy the Courtyard by Marriott very much.
The other surprise was that the breakfast was not included, which means our hotel deal wasn't that great in the end.
Otherwise, the staff was always very nice, helpful and reactive.
For instance, we were upgraded to a better room when we checked-in instead of waiting for the people to check-out in the kind of room we had booked.
The food is very fresh even though a little more expensive than the big hotels around.
All together, after having adjusted to the urban style hotel, we had a great time there.

sample_comments.title: Run down.
sample_comments.text:
We pulled up into the Marriott courtyard to the sounds Balinese traditional music being played live and welcomed with a quaint touch of elegance by a Legong dancer. Our expectations were already set that this was going to be another brilliant place to hang for the remainder of our trip. Unfortunately this was not the case. 

Getting into our room was such an anti-climax. The room was clearly old and run down. What was supposed to be a garden view - overlooked the roof of the Marriott, covered in beer cans dropped by guests from the floors above. Queen beds were small doubles and the room smelled like mould when the aircon wasn't on. It was clear that the images supplied to Agoda had been nicely photoshopped. 

We were upgraded to two different rooms as we didn't get what it said on the tin. However - irrespective of the room, they all faced the same common issues. Old furnishing, dirty windows, pungent smell of mould etc. This place is really in need of a revamp.

The pool area is fantastic though. Unfortunately we aren't fish can couldn't sleep in the pool otherwise we would have. The staff were beautiful. It's just a pity that the aesthetics of the property aren't as awesome the staff that service them.

sample_comments.title: Great rooms but poor service
sample_comments.text:
I went to Courtyard by Marriott with my husband and a 3 year old daughter. The room is very clean and the environment is nice and neat. However, the service that we experienced is not that great. As my daughter was running a fever on that night, we decided to order in (room service) our dinner. We called the room service number at around 645pm and ordered our dinner (2 adult meals + 1 kid's meal) and was told that the order would take 45 mins. We agreed and put down the phone. The dinner did not come at 730pm so at 745pm, my husband called again and repeated our orders and got the reply "On the way." 
At 8pm, our dinner is still not delivered to the room. I called and asked them if they had missed our order. To my horror, they said yes, they missed our order. We would have to wait for another 45 mins to get our dinner. I was very furious because I have a hungry and sick toddler! Then at 830pm, our dinner finally arrived. All appetite was gone by then.

sample_comments.title: Nice hotel in poor location
sample_comments.text:
The hotel itself is nice: clean, modern, safe. The pool is large, but doesn't get enough direct sunlight. Breakfast buffet was great. However, the location is poor. If you are going to Bali for a beach experience, do NOT stay here. First, the hotel is not on the beach, you must take the hotel's van to get there. Second, the beach is DIRTY. It was by far the dirtiest beach and water I have ever seen in my life (and I live in Hong Kong, so believe me -- I've seen dirty beaches). The hotel's beach is at the end of the Nusa Dua stretch, so all of the trash collects on the sand and in the water. The farther you walk down the beach, the cleaner it gets, but it's still quite dirty. We did see some staffers attempting to dig up the trash, but it was simply too much for them to handle. I do not know if this is a seasonal problem, we were there at the end of July. 

I suggest doing your research and figuring out what kind of experience you want in Bali before you book this hotel.

sample_comments.title: Large & Comfortable Hotel & The Room

Eventhough during nyepi day guest can't go out (so it became quite noisy) but playing around the poo was nice and inside the room I didn't get the noisy sound. Maybe bcoz I choose high floors room. The staffs were superbly friendly and helpful. The breakfast has a lot of variety but the taste, not so pleased. Definitely worth it staying during nyepi. from the first time I arrived, I felt like home. Yes, it doesn't have that bali feeling as the design is very modern, but that's why I like the. Hotel.

sample_comments.title: nice hotel,great atmosphere surroundings

we was book on the same day when we arrived at bali. we choosed to booked at Courtyard by Marriot,Nusa Dua because we need relaxation for our vacation,away from crowded. we booked at Agoda with easily process. Then we go to the hotel, the receptionist had already has our name on their list.

sample_comments.title: Value of Money except Not Very Honest!

I ordered a Superior Room, they gave me a Standard Room. When I first time asked what room they gave me, they answered a Standard. I was very unhappy and had the feeling of being deceived. It's either the front desk staffs not honest, or they are too careless!
But eventually I managed to change back to a Superior Room, matching what I have paid.
Other than that, other hotel staffs are friendly with smiling faces, & helpful.

Free WiFi but not too speedy.

Free transport to Kuta Town (every hour) is an advantage.

Breakfast is good enough.

sample_comments.title: Pleasant stay
sample_comments.text:
Travellers who seek for tranquility in a natural modern setting would find it here. The large pool with the trees combined in the center of the hotel made me feel home. The kids club was really 'wow' us, the staff was friendly and there were lots of activities provided from drawing to group activities. Our 7-years-old loved it.

The beach club was also a-must-see place, it has good spot and well-maintained facilities. The driver of the shuttle was the friendliest staff in the hotel, he actively helped returning one of our bags left in the shuttle..

We were there when it was raining and some coridors were leaking which made it slippery. I think the rainy season could be anticipated better. The food was just so-so for a 5-star hotel...but overall...it was a pleasant stay...
sample_comments.positives: Kids club, large pool, nice room

sample_comments.title: Review
sample_comments.text: I enjoyed my stay for 3 days 2 nights in Courtyard, and I love the concept of the private beach with frequent shuttle service. The only things which I felt slightly dissapointed was the internet connection, it wasn't stable most of the time and I've been told that during my return stay, wifi usage is as charge (i.e free wifi only for first time user), however I am unsure whether ths statement is true as I found that as a frequent traveller, I travelled most of the places and so far I've never encountered that I need to pay for wifi service in the hotel stays, and I believe Courtyard as a 5 star hotel would definitely provide a much better wifi service without charges for especially most business people may stay in the premise.
sample_comments.positives: breakfast, staff service, private beach and shuttle services

sample_comments.title: I expected more
sample_comments.text:
Let's start this of by saying that I'll be slightly harsh. But. After all, this IS a 5 star resort and should be treated as such.

And as a 5-star resort, it falls short.
Ridiculous security measures make you feel more like a suspect going in than a warm welcome guest. (First time ever I have to "spread out and be searched" each time upon entering a hotel)
Some people may find it comforting, I found it unnervinf
Rooms are a bit impersonal and small, but clean and nice bed/bathroom.

Lacking proper amenities though: I was expecting better soap (branded, perhaps like in many other 5-star hotels in Indonesia). 
They failed to supply q-tips, after making up my room (2nd day), I lacked all small towels & bath mat, hand hold showerhead in bath doesn't work (room 5202), bath faucet kept dripping, only 1 type of tea/coffee supplied etc.
I was really expecting more for the price and Marriott name.

sample_comments.title: Nice clean new hotel
sample_comments.text:
Nice enough but lacked the final polish. Nothing to complain about except it was very busy & at full capacity with a lot of local people on holiday raiding the breakfast bars & generally making lots of noise & mess but that's just being overly picky.

Service was acceptable without being brilliant whereas I expected a little extra effort as you're paying more for a western style recognised brand.

It's away from the beach but have a private area next to the hyatts beach strip allocated & there's regular shuttles. 

All in all not a bad place but if you have your heart set on Nusa Dua & the western style packaged holiday go for the Westin, St Regis or Hyatt but expect to pay a bit more.

sample_comments.title: Great Food and Beverage performance

Everything perfect.
Only I didn't realize at the booking that the hotel is quite far away from the beach. And the beach faces really extreme high and low tide, thus it was impossible to swim.
sample_comments.positives: The amazing "river pool" - never seen such an awesome pool before. And the staff was extremely friendly and helpful and made my mum's birthday to a real dream.

sample_comments.title: Great swimming pool area. Nothing really for kids to play. Far away from the beach. Not good food.
sample_comments.negatives: The room wardrobe had a cricket inside and every night it was making noise. Could not stop. I believe it was something inside the wood. The Dinner buffet was not really good - you can each much better for half price on all restaurants outside the hotel. There was literally nothing for kids as the kids room area had nothing they could really play rather than some super simple toys for small babies-the mini golf was in awful condition. The beach is not as close as mentioned by the website and shuttle easily get full and you risk to stay there for 40 minutes to wait the next-they should put some more shuttle or something to help people moving.

sample_comments.title: friendly staff
sample_comments.text:
We stayed at this hotel for 3 nights. The location of the hotel is about 3 to 5 mins away from the beach and you would have to take a shuttle to go there. The hotel provides for the shuttle every 30 mins.

The food was so-so...not what we were expecting for a 5star hotel. we paid $25 for the buffet breakfast and they serve the same food everyday. we transferred to sofitel and they have the same buffet price and their food was way better.

sample_comments.title: Very good

sample_comments.title: Holidays

Disappointed with the 02 rooms i booked. 01 room the air con was not working at all and the other which was occupied by my parents was not working well. 
I got a replacement room at the last night and was shocked that the bath towels in the room were filthy and bath robes dirty.
Overall, the staffs are very courteous which made my stay slightly more bearable.

sample_comments.title: If you are a vegetarian please avoid.
sample_comments.positives: Neat and clean property with activities for kids and adults

sample_comments.title: OK Location and casual staff
sample_comments.text:
I find staff love to talk may be part of their training, however they are not really concern about guest convinience. I had not good experience in their only Resturant and at the time of departure. I deposited cash $100/ at the time of check in, which they forget to return at time of check out. I only realized on the way to airport, then i had to come back for the same.
I find staff is busy among their own colleages. Their action have to more sincere to customer.

sample_comments.positives: Rooms are well appointed, very good neat and clean,

sample_comments.title: Nice hotel but service lacking

sample_comments.negatives:
Maybe not value for money. Check in was long and the staff could do more given the price. When directing us to the room we were just told it's in building 5, no offer to help lead us there. 
We also had lunch round the pool on the first day, we went back to the same spot at the pool the next morning and the leftover dirty plate was still sitting there, no one had taken it. These small details where the service and standards were lacking given the price.

sample_comments.title: Stayed and played

sample_comments.title: Great pool but disappointed with power outage and unattentive staff

sample_comments.negatives: There were power outage twice and the last one happened at night for over 1 hour. it's not something we expected to have from a 5 stars hotel in Nusa Dua. The interior is not bad but felt impersonal and basic.

sample_comments.title: Reasonable price 5 stars hotel in bali
sample_comments.text: We love this Hotel. Staff all are over friendly. Room is clean. Relaxing pool and with live band daily. We are doing nothing but just sitting in poolside everyday and relax.

sample_comments.title: Comfortable stay
sample_comments.negatives: We almost missed our flight because of the transfer, miscommunication with the staff

sample_comments.title: A bit like a maximum security prison!
sample_comments.text: The hotel is nice. State of the art hotel but unfortunately it is located in Nusa Dua. Nusa Dua is isolatet from the rest of Bali. Guarded by security personal and surrounded by a fence. The charm of Bali is cept away from Nusa Dua. When ever you enter the hotel you have to pass a security control and even your package will be scanned. The beach is very nice and very clean. And the sea is perfect there. But not for surfing.

sample_comments.title: Great pools to relax and unwind

sample_comments.negatives:

The a la carte meals from the 2 restaurants are not at 5* level, quite pricey and not very good

sample_comments.title: Plunge in. Just do it!
sample_comments.text: The best 2 nights stay so far. Room is big and clean with effective bathroom and balcony facing the pool. But, courtyard should fix in room's acoustic because I can hear every foot steps and all the noises from the next room, pools and the alley. Breakfast is abeit disappointing regarding the option and taste. C'mon, Marriott has that image of good food, right? The best part of this facility is the LAGOON POOL! This is superb. Wide and long blue pool with trees full of life. I did spot squirrels, beautiful sounded perkutut, night owls, even a couple of rare blue needle dragonfly. Brava!

sample_comments.title: The hotel is nice, green and pool was really good. The rooms are big and spacious. We stayed here for 4 nights and could
sample_comments.positives: The rooms were big and spacious. Our room has great outdoor area.
sample_comments.negatives: The doors and the walls of the rooms were very thin. We couldn't sleep a day. We can hear everyone's voice.

sample_comments.title: excellent, relaxing

The room is spacious, each (twin) bed is large so that I do not need an extra bed for my younger son to stay, the pool is amazing and so relaxing, my kids and I are enjoying it very much. The overall service is awesome. sample_comments.title: Chillax hotel so quiet
sample_comments.text: Everything is good but breakfast not too much western food, we dont like their indonesia cusine

sample_comments.title: nice place for stay, quite and nice breakfast

sample_comments.positives: Good service and polite staff, and listen to customer, and having good security

sample_comments.title: Great pool & spa, responsive staff, mediocre food
sample_comments.text: Overall I had a lovely time. Only big quibble was that -- while otherwise and the next night, my room was very quiet -- my first morning my neighbors were either being extremely loud or the room had next to no soundproofing - I could hear their entire conversation word for word. It was pretty awful for 7 am on a vacation. Otherwise, food was not amazing (and the drinks are overpriced - to be expected). But, the pool is really nice, and in a nice garden area and the massage at the spa was one of the best I've ever had. In addition to generally being very helpful and accommodating, the staff let me check in early and check out late even though I hadn't made prior arrangements for the former which I really appreciated. Only other minor point, it was a bit further from the beach than I'd expected (10-15 min walk, or there's a shuttle - the shuttle is not very well signed).
sample_comments.positives: Pool/garden, the massage at the spa, the staff was very responsive and helpful

sample_comments.title: Nice and relaxing
sample_comments.text:
Our room was garden view, which was quite nice and I preferred this instead of the pool view as it gave us a feeling of seclusion. 

The hall way to this room however, had a nasty cheap toiletry smell. And it can be pretty noisy when there are people walking outside, especially when they were pushing their luggage. I think the way they arranged the hall is problematic, sound can reverberate across the hall easily, perhaps if they added carpet it might dampen the noise a bit.

During our stay, we also had problems with the room key cards. They're so sensitive and refused to work after a few times usage, that we had to go to the front desk three times a day - that is until I complained about how crappy the card was that they started to work more reliably. Very curious indeed.

sample_comments.title: All around comfort
sample_comments.text: I stayed for 4 nights and don't have much to complain about. The staff is very nice and thoughtful, the room is comfort and spacious. If you are looking for nice and relax stay, courtyard offers it all.

sample_comments.title: comfortable and safe in Nusa Dua

The hotel food was good but there was one time I ordered Waffles during the breakfast buffet and the staff went inside the kitchen and got me a cold waffle. COLD . They should have made it on the spot. Oh well... There were a few conferences that were going on during our stay that screams some music and entertainment but we were okay with it. We'd probably go back to this hotel but hopes they do something about the necessary improvements on facilities and service.

sample_comments.title: new clean hotel
sample_comments.text:
We were researching for our upcoming stay in Bali and found this hotel had only just opened and still in its soft opening phase. That immediately prompted us to check out this hotel on its own website.

Upon arrival at the hotel, we found it to be very clean and inviting. The architectural design and decor of the hotel immediately gave us a feeling that it will be a memorable stay. The staff was very warm and friendly. She took the time to get to know us more. In fact, every staff member we encountered during our stay were very approachable and friendly, always ready to help. 

We had their buffet breakfast at MoMo Cafe. The food was good but we thought it was a little pricy for the spread they offered. One of the best part of the stay was the pool. Nice place to chill out and dip in the water in the great Bali weather.

We also went to the Spa in the hotel for a Couple Balinese Massage. The Spa had just opened for 2 weeks so everything was very new and clean. Once again, the staff were very friendly and easy to chat with.

sample_comments.title: New and elegant hotel with tight security measures
sample_comments.text:
We stayed here for two nights & were given a large corner room with a King-sized bed & there's even room for an extra single-sized bed, which we requested for. Our balcony looks out to the pool, and great for enjoying the breeze.

The room has everything you need, from the writer's desk, arm-chair,safe deposit box, ironing board, 2 or 3 pinhole power outlets, i-phone docking amplifier cum charging station, minibar, slim plasma tv, toiletries, the bathroom comes fitted with a spacious bathtub as well as a standing rain shower.
Everything is practically brand new as the hotel was officially opened in February this year.
The only gripe i have is the huge & heavy sliding door to the bathroom, it's too heavy to push it open/shut when you need to access the bathroom.

There's a short strip of shops & eateries just behind the hotel establishment. The beautiful Nusa Dua beach is just 5 to 10min.s walking distance, simply ask the hotel security guards or staff for the direction. Staff were very friendly & courteous. Nusa Dua beach is so much cleaner & pretty than Kuta beach.

There's practically no where else to go to around the Nusa Dua area after dark. But that is okay since we were really dead beat after the day-trips to GWK, Uluwatu temple, the sandy beaches, etc.
Before i went to bed, I heard the low bass sound of airplanes flying over in the slience of the night. It wasn't disturbing or loud at all, my room-mates didnt even notice that & slept soundly.

Totally enjoyed the stay at Courtyard by Marriot and i would love to return in future. A great retreat location to enjoy the peace & quiet away from all the hustle & bustle of Kuta.
sample_comments.positives: FREE Marriot Rewards member for life upon check-in, FREE WIFI access 24/7, Free use of gym & fitness room, iphone docking amplifier-cum charger in bedroom, Plasma TV with clear cable programs, Electric kettle, Electronic weighing machine in bathroom, lovely landscapes, impressive swimming pool with ample day beds, 5 - 10 min.s walk to Nusa Dua beach

sample_comments.title: New and clean hotel
sample_comments.text: This is a 3 month old hotel and services are still lacking. We have to call 3 times for the luggage to be brought into our room.

sample_comments.title: Good value for money
sample_comments.text:
The room size is reasonable but incredibly relaxing and homie. Staff are helpful and you can get free super speed internet connection by registering as marriott member.

However, there were some leaks at our bathroom showers and the soundproffing of the rooms can be improved. You can almost hear every people walking on the aisle and people next door.

Security of ppl travelling with/rented vehicle can also be improved as they dont provide any identification for all the vehicle parked in the area.

Overall, I recommend this hotel for the holiday seasons, maybe not for the summer..

Dear Jennifer,

Thank you for sharing your positive experience during your stay at Courtyard. We're pleased to hear that you enjoyed the pool and the convenient location, being only a 10-minute walk to Bali Collection. Your feedback on the breakfast buffet, facilities, and the overall atmosphere is valuable.

We appreciate your recommendation and hope to welcome you back during the holiday seasons for another enjoyable stay.

Warm regards,
Courtyard by Marriott Bali Nusa Dua Resort

sample_comments.title: Tired hotel in desperate need of a facelift.
sample_comments.text:
We have stayed here before and each year, the building looks worse and worse. Outside, the entrance is quite nice but as you wander the hallway to your room (easy to get lost) it's plain to see all the damage from water leaks in the ceilings and walls that are covered by new paint and patching. 
The front desk staff was helpful and accommodated all our requests. The bellman was friendly and we had a nice chat. The room was average and, unfortunately, we were given a connecting room as we were last year. Our last visit resulted in a change of rooms at nearly 11 PM due to extremely loud neighbors and a connecting door that offered very little privacy and did nothing to muffle the noise. This time, we were much more lucky to have no neighbors but the potential was there for another noisy stay. 
The beds are comfortable but the furniture is showing its age. The shower looked old with water stains and a rain shower that seemed as if it would fall off at any moment. The hand shower was so worn that it only pointed straight down while in it's cradle. The first shower we took led to a huge water leak on the floor as there was no sealant on the little step in the shower. To his credit, the maintenance staff came and fixed it after we made a few calls to the front desk but the condition should never get the point it was. The towels are worn to the point that they're almost no longer usable. Not what you would expect from a Marriott, even a Coutryard. 
Breakfast was very good and the staff was great. Good variety of choices that changed daily and plenty of items made to order. Sitting by the pool was pleasant but it got quite warm if breakfast was taken after 9. 
One other thing to note is the parking situation. The front desk and security check point with mandatory metal detector is a floor above ground level. After parking the rental cal with arm-loads of shopping, we were forced to walk up the driveway hill and drag our items to our room the long way. Perhaps there is valet
